human_required: Confirm dataset licenses before release or paper submission.
AIVIVN Kaggle mirror is binary train/test, not the 3-way split described in the workflow; confirm whether to keep it or provide the exact source.
Rule-based social labels are silver_agent only; two reviewers plus adjudicator must approve before gold splits.
Rare label thresholds are low for sarcasm, irony, idiom_figurative, code_switching, implicit_sentiment; use enrichment queue for targeted human review.
No social-media crawling was performed because ENABLE_SOCIAL_CRAWL=false and ToS/legal review is pending.
VIVID-derived rows are retained as a separately labelled evaluation stratum; authorization and license review remain required before release or unrestricted use.

aivivn_2019.note: binary train/test mirror, not workflow expected 3-way split

uit_vsfc.source: Hugging Face dataset script URLs / Google Drive files

VIVID_seed_and_irony_generation.note: Author-created, context-augmented derivatives used as a labelled sensitivity stratum; descriptive P1 analysis does not establish redistribution rights or causal source effects.
